title: Aaro Ek Prithibi
overview: Pratiksha, 27, arrives in London three months after her marriage and shortly finds herself entrapped in a vortex of lies, deceit and danger. If she does not get out of the mess, everything in her life is at risk. She meets Ayesha.

title: La - Tomatina
overview: A digital journalist's detention by secret police takes an unexpected turn when a government lockdown forces extended confinement.

title: Anora
overview: A young sex worker from Brooklyn gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and impulsively marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as his parents set out to get the marriage annulled.

title: Gladiator II
overview: Years after witnessing the death of the revered hero Maximus at the hands of his uncle, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum after his home is conquered by the tyrannical Emperors who now lead Rome with an iron fist. With rage in his heart and the future of the Empire at stake, Lucius must look to his past to find strength and honor to return the glory of Rome to its people.

title: Jab Khuli Kitaab
overview: When Anusuya confesses to her husband, Gopal, that she cheated on him with another man a few months into their five decade-long marriage, all hell breaks loose. Angry and hurt, Gopal decides to seek divorce while he struggles to keep the rest of the family oblivious to his and Anusuya’s blistering secret. What follows is an impassioned, often hilarious deep-dive into the lives of Gopal and Anusuya while they manoeuvre the rocky roads of their relationship, rediscovering the meaning of love and togetherness.

title: Tanvi the Great
overview: Autistic young Tanvi Raina learns of her deceased Indian Army father's dream to salute the flag at Siachen Glacier. Despite barriers facing those neurodivergent in military service, she resolves to complete his mission.

title: Laalo: Krishna Sada Sahaayate
overview: A rickshaw driver trapped in a farmhouse confronts his past demons while experiencing visions of Lord Krishna, who guides him through a transformative journey of self-discovery and healing.

title: The Taj Story
overview: Vishnu Das is a local guide who becomes driven by a curiosity to uncover the true history behind the iconic Taj Mahal monument.

title: No Other Choice
overview: After being laid off and humiliated by a ruthless job market, a veteran paper mill manager descends into violence in a desperate bid to reclaim his dignity.

title: It Was Just an Accident
overview: An unassuming mechanic is reminded of his time in an Iranian prison when he encounters a man he suspects to be his sadistic jailhouse captor.

title: Dheeram
overview: A police officer investigates pattern killings in Calicut, discovering a vengeful killer's scheme. As he unravels the truth, he faces a moral dilemma between law and justice for a bereaved parent.

title: Durlabh Prasad Ki Dusri Shadi
overview: Story revolves around a son who, in an unexpected turn of events, decides to arrange a marriage for his father in order to fulfill the demands of his potential better half's family, who insist on having a woman in the household.

title: Projapati 2
overview: Joy lives in London with his daughter. He wants his parents to stay with them in London, but his father, who runs a hotel in Kolkata, refuses to go to London.

title: Lawho Gouranger Naam Rey
overview: Lawho Gouranger Naam Rey intertwines three timelines from Mahaprabhu's divine era to colonial theatre and a modern film set.

title: Bhartha Mahasayulaku Wignyapthi
overview: What begins as a casual fling between a married man, Ram a.k.a Satya and Manasa in the middle of an international business trip, balloons into an out-of-the-blue mess when the latter lands in Hyderabad, disrupting Ram’s otherwise stable marriage with Balamani.

title: Toh Ti Ani Fuji
overview: In a world where love is filtered, scored and predicted, a couple in Pune, India, collides in a fierce, consuming romance. What begins in urgency and desire slowly fractures. Time intrudes. Ambition shifts. Affection turns conditional. What once felt infinite begins to bruise and break. Seven years later, beneath the shadow of Mount Fuji, they meet again. Japan is quieter. The air is thinner.  They are no longer who they were. Carrying different lives, different scars, they stand face to face with a past that never truly left them.  Can love survive its own history or does it merely haunt those who try to return to it? Toh, Ti Ani Fuji is an intimate, visually driven meditation on love, memory and the fragile, devastating hope of second chances.

title: Rahu Ketu
overview: In the magical world of writer Churu Lal Sharma, his unlucky creations Rahu and Ketu spring to life, causing hilarious chaos instead of fighting corruption. When the mischievous Meenu Taxi steals Churu's mystical notebook, the bumbling duo are dragged into absurd adventures that land them in the middle of a drug mafia.

title: Border 2
overview: Three idealistic soldiers in the Indian army, navy and air force face grueling combat conditions in this film set during the 1971 Indo-Pak war.

title: Mardaani 3
overview: Officer Shivani Shivaji Roy returns to hunt down those behind the disappearance of young girls, risking everything to bring them back alive.

title: Om Shanti Shanti Shantihi
overview: Prashanthi gives up her dreams for love, only to fall into abusive relationships first with her lecturer and later with her husband, Omkar, who pretends to support her but turns violent and manipulative. After enduring trauma, betrayal, and a heartbreaking miscarriage, she secretly strengthens herself, escapes his control, and rebuilds her life by starting a successful business. When Omkar's abuse becomes public and reaches court, she refuses divorce, not out of love, but to ensure no other woman suffers the same fate

title: Bokshi
overview: Anahita, traumatised by the brutal disappearance of her mother, finds comfort in Shalini, her history teacher. On an unconventional school excursion to a mysterious prehistoric site, she confronts her terrifying destiny.

title: Out Iris
overview: A flickering survey of worlds both urban and botanical. The field of vision unrolls indefinitely into off-screen space – a durational panorama, too vast for the eye to behold. A moving arabesque, a painting in the woods.

title: The Gratitude List
overview: This film explores love, communication, and the feelings we often leave unspoken in relationships. As two individuals confront their emotions and unexpressed thoughts, their journey reveals how understanding and honesty can reshape a relationship.

title: Rang De!
overview: In the middle of all noise, one colour feels different.

title: Wandererr
overview: When his prized possession is destroyed, 8-year-old Aarush resolves to find the culprit and give them the "worst punishment ever".

title: The Hour Of Truth
overview: The Hour Of Truth is a film inspired by a one-act play by Percival Wilde. The story deals with the life of a bank employee. He faces struggles of a financial fraud in his bank by standing with honesty and truth. As the owner of the bank is his friend, he goes through confusion and decides whether to stand with honesty or not.

title: Jim Jam Jelly
overview: Get Ready For The Ultimate Adventure "Jee Le Zaraa" Join The Journey Of Friendship , Self-Discovery And Thrilling Experiences With Laughter , Excitement And Unforgettable Moments , This Series Will Take You On A Ride Of A Lifetime

title: Street Flow 3
overview: Grieving and facing the consequences of their crimes, the Traoré brothers get one last chance to forge a new path.

title: ARYAN
overview: After a young man is found dead in his apartment under suspicious circumstances, a seasoned investigator uncovers a chilling link to a recent suicide tied to illegal betting. With no signs of forced entry and a cryptic handwritten note left behind, the case appears to be a calculated murder. But as hidden struggles surface, the truth proves far more unsettling than anyone imagined.

title: Chai aur Parchi
overview: Sometimes, it's not the tea that burns; it's the words left behind. A simple note, a simple moment, and a silence that grows heavier with every passing second. Chai aur Parchi is an 11-minute suspense drama about the things we ignore until they refuse to be ignored.

title: Subedaar
overview: Haunted by loss and drifting away from his daughter, a retired Subedaar Arjun Maurya’s newly found civilian life is jolted by one reckless act. As old wounds reopen, he must summon the warrior within to face a new kind of war - one that hits too close to his heart.

title: Charitha Kamakshi
overview: Charitha is an innocent girl begins her married life with a passionate filmmaker. As she tries to adjust to her new love and world, she slowly discovers that although her husband is kind at heart, he is morally compromised in his profession. His choices eventually land him in police custody. With little knowledge of the outside world, she must step beyond her innocence and confront a stubborn Sub-Inspector to bring him back

title: 13 Teen
overview: A high school teen struggles with peer pressure and drugs, navigating choices that could shape his future forever.

title: War Machine
overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

title: Hoppers
overview: Scientists have discovered how to 'hop' human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals. Animal lover Mabel seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world beyond anything she could have imagined.

title: The Bride!
overview: A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago to ask groundbreaking scientist Dr. Euphronious to create a companion for him. The two revive a murdered young woman and The Bride is born. But what ensues is beyond what either of them imagined.

title: Ishqa'n De Lekhe
overview: Starring the sensational Gurnam Bhullar alongside the stunning Isha Malviya, this Punjabi cinema is crafted for every soul that has ever loved deeply. Directed by the talented Manvir Brar, Ishqa'n De Lekhe is set to redefine Punjabi romance on the big screen.

title: Strangers in the Park
overview: A former communist militant and a "live and let live" man form an unlikely friendship on a park bench, sharing their life stories with humor and heart.

title: Mension House Mallesh
overview: In a quiet village where gossip spreads faster than the wind, a swaggering young man becomes the talk of the town after his wedding night sparks unexpected rumours. What follows is a hilarious chain of misunderstandings, ego clashes, and small-town chaos. Mension House Mallesh is a lively rural entertainer packed with satire and nonstop laughter.

title: Kadhal Reset Repeat
overview: Two people attempt to restart their romance after a major breakdown, believing that a “reset” will fix what went wrong. Just as hopeful habits begin, the shoals of memory, regret and new expectations force them to search for what they really want. A loop of love, loss and renewal takes them through familiar terrain with unfamiliar stakes.

title: Sambhavam Adhyayam Onnu
overview: After becoming stuck in a time loop in a haunted forest, a man works to save himself and the other trapped souls around him.

title: S. Saraswathi
overview: A devoted mother whose life is shattered when her 12-year-old daughter goes missing. Desperate for answers, she turns to the police for help, but as the investigation unfolds, unexpected twists begin to deepen the mystery.

title: Aasai
overview: A young couple are mentally and physically harassed by two men while on a road trip. However, the situation puts their love to the test, making them go their separate ways.

title: Vadam
overview: A action packed Village Family Drama. Hero’s Extraordinary Bond with his Bull. Story based on “Vada Manju Virattu”.  Family relationship highlighted emotionally

title: Charak: Fair of Faith
overview: The disappearance of two children creates tension in a village, as locals suspect the involvement of a nearby ascetic tribe.

title: Phonibabu Viral
overview: What's the ideal age gap for marriage?

title: Yaarra Antha Paiyan Naanthan Antha Paiyan
overview: Vijay and Shalini’s marriage is crumbling under constant misunderstandings. In the same city, Deepika loses her alcoholic husband Manikandan and is left drowning in loneliness.  Seeking comfort, Deepika and Vijay cross the line and fall into a secret affair.But danger strikes when Sukumar, a corrupt sub-inspector obsessed with Deepika, begins  hunting her for his own desires. As guilt closes in on Vijay and suspicion rises for Shalini, Deepika is trapped between a forbidden relationship and a ruthless predator.  Will Shalini discover the truth? And can Deepika escape Sukumar’s grip before everything collapses?

title: Mustafa Mustafa
overview: A viral social media clip ruins a man's reputation. Despite his claims it is fake, chaos ensues through white lies and misunderstandings, testing the trust of his friends and his lover.

title: Mrithyunjay
overview: An intense murder investigation unfolds when a man refuses to accept a death casually deemed natural by the police. As he digs deeper, what begins as doubt turns into a relentless pursuit of truth, uncovering layers of deception and danger

title: Motherhood
overview: Swati has built a respectable life in Mumbai, but everything is unravelling. Her predatory boss exploits her financial condition while her husband drowns in debt. When Swati comes to know her ailing mother Hemalata is not long for this world, Swati returns to a house that once was home. Her childhood home in Pune with her scorned younger sister Sarika, who has cared for their difficult mother alone for the last three years. The sisters' reunion is brutal, filled with accusations of abandonment. Fighting guilt, rage, and helplessness, the three find peace, until a fateful night when Swati discovers her old wedding video. The film explores how families survive through silence, sacrifice, and secrets that both save and destroy them.

title: Oh Butterfly!
overview: When a series of unfortunate coincidences involving a woman, her husband and her ex, culminates in a shocking death, her long-lost sister returns to redeem her.

title: Mehta & Co.
overview: Set in the crowded lanes of Bangalore’s Chickpet, a reluctant son finds himself responsible for ‘Mehta & Co.’ — his father’s saree shop. As a new signboard law turns storefronts into sites of tension, a moment of violence forces him to confront grief he has long refused to face.

title: High Tension
overview: In a dark night, a man takes help of a cyclist to get petrol for his motorbike.

title: Bhidewada
overview: College student Jai Sabnis films a disturbing incident at Bhide Wada. Despite pressure from family and boyfriend to remain quiet, she draws inspiration from Savitribai and Jyotiba Phule to confront a powerful system and fight for justice.

title: Na Jaane Kaun Aa Gaya
overview: A love triangle. From Kaushal's breaking world to Tina's silent emotional conflict and Veer's transparent and blunt love, three hearts navigate guilt, longing, and impossible choices.

title: Black pepper
overview: Kala kagaz is a short film that feature the story of two that have big dreams

title: Butterfly_Girl_85
overview: She believed, and she did it.

Sangeetha and Her Husband Move Into a New Flat, Excited to Begin a New Chapter in Their Lives. From the Very First Night, Sangeetha Starts Experiencing Strange and Mysterious Incidents Inside the House. She Feels a Negative Aura and Senses the Presence of an Unknown Person Connected to a Buddha Idol Left Behind in the Flat. As Fear and Confusion Grow, She Begins to Search for Answers,sangeetha Realizes the Truth Behind the Mysterious Presence She How Overcomes the Situation and Restores Peace to Her Home

title: Chalti Ka Naam Gaadi
overview: Life follows the script written by destiny.

title: Chellamada Nee Enakku
overview: Chellamada Nee Enakku is a Tamil movie starring Vashi Karan, Neha Sri and Boss Venkat in prominent roles. It is directed by Anand Shivam

title: Andakagasam
overview: Someone who wants to be a hero...He enters a 100-year-old castle where kings lived in search of money...whether he takes the money or not is the story...a story that takes place one night...

title: Unseen Moves: A story of trust
overview: When Harsh falls for Tanya in an intense online romance, their love unravels into a dangerous game where nothing is as it seems.

title: Kavaru
overview: The glow you saw in 'Kumbalangi Nights' has a deeper story beneath. Through the voices of local residents, fishermen, and scientists, this documentary explores how this enchanting glow is formed and the unseen ecological and social consequences that come with its fame.

title: Iravan
overview: Despite living in a so-called progressive era, a tribal mother fights to send her son back to school, leading to his brave journey through the forest in pursuit of education.

title: Gaur: The Hills Beckon
overview: In the recent past, Satpura, the land of abundance, has contributed to Megaherbivore Revival at Sanjay Tiger Reserve by sending 16 Gaurs. This time, it's not about Revival; but about building a robust future for the Indian Gaur at Bandhavgarh by supplementing the existing population with 50 individuals to bring in gene-pool diversity. This was a special operation—guided, moulded, led by proud and confident women at every level.

title: Ravam - Sound of Soul
overview: Mouli, an aspiring filmmaker, joins Pooja and Ravi to document eerie experiments on the sound of souls in a remote village. What starts as a creative project quickly turns into a terrifying encounter with supernatural forces and possession.

title: Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere
overview: With rare access and no holds barred, the acclaimed documentarian investigates a growing ultra-masculine network and its controversial influencers.

title: Made in Korea
overview: A woman from a small town in Tamil Nadu moves to South Korea — a place she always dreamed of — but struggles to find her footing in a foreign land.

title: Nawab Cafe
overview: A family grapples with communication barriers as a father and son circle around conversations they desperately need but cannot bring themselves to have.

title: Iskaboner Bibi
overview: A domestic-suspense noir is packed with secrets and scheming.

title: Rahul Subramanian: Who are You?
overview: Rahul Subramanian's 60 minutes stand up comedy special - WHO ARE YOU? which he toured for over 2 years across the world including the Edinburgh Fringe Festival and the Melbourne International Comedy Festival, where this special was nomintated for the Most Outstanding Show in 2025..

title: Iron Lung
overview: The stars are gone. The planets have disappeared. Only individuals aboard space stations or starships were left to give the end a name -- The Quiet Rapture. After decades of decay and crumbling infrastructure, the Consolidation of Iron has made a discovery on a barren moon designated AT-5. An ocean of blood. Hoping to discover desperately needed resources they immediately launch an expedition. A submarine is crafted and a convict is welded inside. Due to the pressure and depth of the ocean the forward viewport has been encased in metal. If successful, they will earn their freedom. If not, another will follow. This will be the 13th expedition.

title: The Ugly
overview: One day while overseeing a documentary crew filming his blind father at work, Im Dong-hwan gets a phone call that his missing mother’s remains have been found after forty years. Determined to find the truth of her disappearance, Dong-hwan embarks on a twisted odyssey through his family’s traumatic past, uncovering dark secrets along the way.

title: Barbara - Becoming Shirin David
overview: Shirin David. Babsi. Barbara. Meet the woman behind the rap star as she balances fame, business and her identity in this intimate, emotional documentary.

title: Ramyaa
overview: A compelling crime drama that explores human emotions, relationships, and the struggles of individuals trying to find their place in society, unfolding through an intense and engaging narrative.

title: Vowels
overview: A romantic anthology of five love stories exploring different dimensions: Attraction, Emotion, Intimacy, Obsession, and Unconditional love, each reflecting diverse emotional experiences.

title: Kenatha Kanom
overview: Desperate to find water, residents of a parched village start digging a new well, but what they find is not water but a dinosaur fossil.

title: Portraits
overview: The story follows Raghav, a troubled artist living in isolation after personal loss and betrayal. His life gradually intertwines with several other wounded souls, each carrying their own struggles and emotions. Through their connected lives, the narrative explores the complexities of the human mind and the search for inner peace.

title: Vengeance
overview: Vengeance follows a young woman with a mysterious past that slowly comes to light. Driven by an unrelenting purpose, she transforms into someone capable of crossing any boundary to fulfill her mission. Each obstacle she faces only sharpens her resolve, pulling her deeper into a ruthless path.

title: Dukan
overview: A social work student visiting Kamathipura for her research becomes an unexpected witness to a bizarre dilemma when a local pimp and several sex workers struggle to perform the last rites of an unknown elderly sex worker because no one knows her caste or religion.

title: Police Family
overview: At a Madurai police station, Vinoth—the son of powerful Chennai gangster Dhana—is brutally beaten by four policemen led by SI Raja and secretly dumped outside the city. The next day, he is found murdered.  Blaming the officers, Dhana unleashes ruthless revenge on them and their families. As fear and suspicion close in, SI Raja races to uncover the real killer—before Dhana’s trap destroys everything.  Who truly killed Vinoth?  What was the motive?  The shocking truth erupts in the climax.

title: Kissa Court Kachahari Ka
overview: Ditching traditional melodrama for raw grit, the story offers an authentic dive into the Indian judicial system. Set within the corridors of a district court, it highlights the human cost of bureaucracy and the grueling struggle for justice through a stark, realistic lens.

title: Anthony
overview: Set along the coastal shores of Jaffna, the story follows a fisherman and his family  whose lives are inseparably tied to the sea. As he struggles to balance his responsibilities toward his profession and his family, a tender love story unfolds, shaping his choices and testing his values. Daily life within the fishing community  its hardships, traditions, and unspoken bonds, forms the backdrop of the narrative. When personal desires begin to clash with family expectations, the protagonist is forced to confront sacrifice, loyalty, and the true meaning of love. Through moments of romance, conflict, and emotional depth, the film reveals the  strength of family ties and the resilience of a community that survives by trusting the sea and each other.

title: Kolaiseval
overview: A village located in the Thiruvannamalai district has followed a belief for over 200 years. If a woman in the village becomes pregnant, it is customary to cook Pongal and sacrifice a goat to their family deity, which is located in the middle of a large forest nearby.  Now the heroine of the story is nine months pregnant. As per the tradition, the family travels to the temple. However, the forest area surrounding the temple is known for many anti-social activities.  What happens to the family that goes to this mysterious place? Why is the temple located deep inside the forest?

title: Dissected
overview: A shortfilm exploring the emotional breaking point of doctors under pressure.

title: Kaattu Kaamedy
overview: When a wrong phone call causes an unexpected problem, three friends are pulled into a night of escalating trouble.

title: She Was Here
overview: A reflective tale about love, loss, and the invisible ways the people we cherish continue to shape our lives.

title: Dialtone to Catharsis
overview: Dialtone to Catharsis is our take on a stylistic action film that explores the life of a vigilante, driven by her own thirst for the blood of sin. In one of Bhubaneswar's loneliest roads, a moving car barrels through the night with a woman, kidnapped and struggling against her restraints, drugged to weaken her and muffle her screams with blaring music. The driver, a seemingly underconfident local hood, snaps threats, pulling over on a desolate road to shove her into the trunk after she continues to put up a strong fight. That's when SHE appears. The night erupts from abduction to retribution, forging an uneasy alliance amid the hum of indifferent streets.

title: Wait Is All I Have
overview: The film is about Muthu, a 60-year-old man, who reminisces about his family  and how they slowly became strangers under the same sky.

title: Project Y
overview: Mi-sun and Do-kyung might be used to struggling in the most dangerous part of Seoul's Gangnam district, but that doesn't mean they've settled into it. With no one but each other to rely on, the two friends grind away to save the money needed to leave their dangerous lifestyles behind. But just as "retirement" comes within reach, the world betrays them, shattering their hopes. On the edge of a dead end, they discover a hidden fortune of dirty cash and gold in Gangnam – and place all their bets on one final high-stakes gamble of a lifetime.

title: Bayaan
overview: When a letter accuses a revered cult leader of abuse, rookie detective Roohi Kartar is sent to a small Indian town to investigate. Confronted by a wall of silence and blind devotion, she must uncover the truth before it's too late.

title: Beyond the Pages
overview: While reading Aarav's diary, Vanya finds herself drawn back to a quiet afternoon in college and a classmate who carried more silence than words. Through a diary and a conversation about fathers and absence, she begins to understand that love often hides behind fear, and that some calls remain unanswered long after they are made.

title: Superglue
overview: Art assistant Ryan wants to leave Crispin’s crew and something personal of Freddy’s goes missing.

title: Wrangler
overview: When a controlled life falls apart, strange desires begin to writhe.

title: Baking Soda
overview: Two clueless friends discover a mysterious white powder packet and believe they’ve struck gold. Armed with nothing but confidence and bad judgment, they dive into a plan that slowly spirals out of control.

title: Good Time
overview: An old friend comes back after a long time. They spend good time together like nothing ever changed, watching TV, playing games, drinking beer, listening to music, and talking about life. For a moment, it feels like the good old days again. But when the friend leaves something feels different.

title: Labuk Jabuk
overview: A kid wants to have fun in ride during Mela, against his family's restrictive nature.... will he be able to enjoy the ride?

title: 2D
overview: A boy living in a bachelor’s room suffers from OCD and often gets irritated by the careless habits of his roommate. One day, his frustration turns into extreme anger, pushing him into an unconscious state. When he regains his senses, he becomes confused and terrified, believing that he might have killed his roommate during that moment of rage. Panicked and unsure of what really happened, he calls another friend for help. When the friend arrives to check on the situation, unexpected twists begin to unfold, revealing that the truth behind the incident is far more complicated than it first appears.

title: RUMINATION
overview: In a quiet conversation between two friends, one claims he has travelled to a forbidden place from which no one has ever returned. As the other doubts his story, fragments of strange memories emerge—ashes, sketches, a mysterious eye, and silent visions of nature. As reality and illusion blur, the question remains: did he truly survive the journey, or is he only trapped in the echoes of his own mind?

title: Click Ceremony
overview: It is a story of an aged photographer Sansar Nath who gets entangled in the crisis of two young couples. He is unable to cope up with the changing times. Now he must accept the truth or fight for deliverance in his solitude.

title: Curtain. The rehearsal of Julius Caesar
overview: A play about Julius Caesar is premiering. Will our protagonist get the role of Julius Caesar?

title: The Plastic Detox
overview: This eye-opening documentary follows six couples with unexplained infertility as they lower their exposure to plastics in hopes it helps them conceive.

title: PEN
overview: Two journalists' journey of their ambition which later takes a sharp turn.

title: Shamik Chakrabarti: Despite Appearances
overview: Through understated humor and interconnected anecdotes, Shamik navigates bureaucracy, identity, and everyday absurdity while unraveling a deceptively simple misadventure of losing his laptop.

title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge
overview: As rival gangs, corrupt officials and a ruthless Major Iqbal close in, Hamza's mission for his country spirals into a bloody personal war where the line between patriot and monster disappears in the streets of Lyari.

title: Mann-Pishach
overview: In June 1990, a junior archaeologist travels to the isolated village of Hadamgaon to investigate a mysterious stone dome revealed after a monsoon landslide. As he stays with a young widow and observes the village’s strange customs, sealed homes, deserted streets, and a strict rule to lock indoors before nightfall, he uncovers a buried structure built not to worship but to contain the darkest impulses of the human mind. In Hadamgaon, what is buried does not remain silent for long.

title: Flying Fish
overview: The weight of the world doesn’t discriminate between man, fish or fruit. decay is inevitable. will you take the leap towards better times?

title: Youth
overview: Youth follows Praveen, a 15-year-old boy who enters adolescence determined to find true love before school ends. As he goes through multiple relationships and heartbreaks, he slowly begins to understand what love truly means. Along the way, the experiences shape his growth, maturity, and outlook on life.

title: Aadu 3
overview: Shaji Pappan and Co. opens a Pandora's box of reincarnations and multiple timelines  leading to comic chaos of epic proportions.

title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh
overview: A tribal boy is shaped by the values of his teacher, who gives him the name 'Bhagat Singh'. He grows up deeply rooted in strong morals, which guide his actions throughout his life.He stands firm against injustice and takes on powerful evil forces, even when facing overwhelming odds.

title: The Black Bible
overview: Set in the fictional village of Asthinapuram, near Tamil Nadu–Kerala border, When Alisha and her mother desperate to escape the cursed land long belongs to colonial-era witchcraft and black magic, they find themselves spiraling into a deeper sinister. With only Alisha’s boyfriend standing by them, the trio must confront the horrors that dwell in silence… and the curse that refuses to be outrun.

title: Jazz City
overview: Set in 1971 Calcutta, a jazz club becomes the backdrop for a revolutionary awakening as music intertwines with language, identity and the birth of a nation during a pivotal historical moment.

title: Korpur
overview: In 1997, University Exam Controller Moushumi Sen disappeared amid a 50-crore scam. She fled to London, according to headlines, but a silenced police officer suspected a more sinister political conspiracy. Two decades later, journalist Anupam reopens the case, unearthing a labyrinth of institutional rot. Is she dead or hidden?

title: Ekshathe Alada
overview: When a couple realise their marriage is dead and mutually choose divorce, their families launch a relentless mission to keep them together—forcing them to fight not just for freedom, but for the radical idea that happiness matters more than a “perfect” marriage.

title: Ponnapurathu Yakshi
overview: After moving into a historic estate, a family discovers their young daughter has befriended a vengeful spirit. To save her, the father must unearth a century-old atrocity and confront the ghost with an ancient, sanctified weapon.

title: Seva Bhavi
overview: The film revolves around the character Jiga, dubbed "Seva Bhavi" (meaning a selfless helper or server), who is always ready to serve the community. The story focuses on his humorous interactions and, as suggested by character teasers, his "social service" activities that create a "full-on entertainment" experience. The plot involves engaging character work and comedic situations, including characters like "Dalsukh," designed to make it a family-oriented watch.

title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
overview: After his estranged son gets embroiled in a Nazi plot, self-exiled gangster Tommy Shelby must return to Birmingham to save his family — and his nation.

title: RAGE
overview: Anbu, a taxi driver from Kannagi Nagar, meets Regina, a mute IT employee, during his regular trips and falls for her. When he learns about her troubled personal life, he suppresses his feelings. One night, Regina dies in what appears to be an accident—but soon, it’s revealed to be a planned murder. Shockingly, multiple unconnected people are involved. RAGE follows Anbu’s journey to uncover the truth behind Regina’s death and the tangled motives that led to it.

title: BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG
overview: BTS is back. The iconic group returns to the stage for a live reunion concert to perform legendary hits and unveil brand-new tracks.

title: Mazhameenukal
overview: A newly married couple discovers a mysterious spiritual connection when, in their dreams, they meet each other as children, living the childhood they never shared, yet somehow always belonged to.

title: TVF's Headshot
overview: Follows the journey of Sachin, a young man caught between his passion for professional gaming and the heavy weight of real-world responsibilities.

title: Frangipani: The Short Film
overview: A quiet tribute to a friend who believed Kaber Vasuki first and left too soon, remembered through music and fragments of memory.

title: Paharganj to Phuket
overview: A simple man from Delhi sets out on what he calls the journey of a lifetime. From the crowded lanes of Paharganj to the shining shores of Phuket. What follows is a story filled with unexpected encounters, new experiences, small revelations, and moments that feel larger than life. As he narrates his adventure, the trip begins to take on a rhythm of its own. Funny, dramatic, and at times strangely intimate. Is it just a holiday? A transformation? Or something else entirely? Paharganj to Phuket is a travel tale about dreams, desire, and the stories we tell when we return home.

title: Hannah Montana 20th Anniversary Special
overview: Filmed in front of a live studio audience and hosted by Alex Cooper of 'Call Her Daddy' fame, Miley Cyrus reflects on the creation and impact of the series, with never-before-seen archival footage, and some of the show's most memorable sets will be 'brought back to life' — including the Stewart family living room and the legendary Hannah Montana closet.

title: Panchhi 2
overview: After losing love, Panchi finds love through a voice on the same phone number, until truth, crime, and blood ties pull him into a dark spiral of fate.

title: Project Hail Mary
overview: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction… but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

title: Prathichaya
overview: After Kerala’s Chief Minister dies in a scandal engineered by a ruthless media tycoon, his son a brilliant tech entrepreneur enters the blood-soaked arena of politics to expose the conspiracy, vindicate his father, and turn technology against those who weaponized it

title: Band Melam
overview: Giri and Raaji grew up together in a small village; their love and bonding also grew, but changing fortunes and misunderstandings drove them and their families apart. While Raaji moves ahead with her studies, Giri searches for his path through music with his village band. Life takes them in completely different directions until circumstances bring them face to face again. What really unfolds between them forms the rest of the story.

title: G.O.A.T
overview: A small-time goon and his friends agree to stage a fake kidnapping for a bride-to-be in exchange for ransom money, but their plan backfires when their hostage proves more dominant than expected.

title: Rosie: The Saffron Chapter
overview: Upcoming Hindi movie

title: Voracious
overview: In a medieval kingdom, a princess is locked in a cave, held captive  by a dragon. The royal cook, Bram, is in love with her and prepares  meals for her daily. When he learns that a knight is on his way to  deliver her, he decides to try his luck and leaves to save her. But  once he arrives, the reality is much different from his expectations...

title: Budh Singh
overview: N the heart of rural Punjab, Budh Singh follows the life of a middle-class tehsil clerk struggling to uphold the values instilled by his father while battling financial pressure and moral temptation.

title: SCRIPTED
overview: A struggling writer-programmer sits alone at his computer, trying to create a script from scratch. After stepping away, he returns to find it writing itself, reflecting his actions as reality and code blur-and he may be inside it right now

title: They Will Kill You
overview: A woman answers a help wanted ad to be a housekeeper in a mysterious high-rise in New York City, not realizing she is entering a community that has seen a number of disappearances over the years and may be under the grip of a Satanic cult.

title: BTS: THE RETURN
overview: They're back! BTS gathers in LA to record their album "Arirang" in this documentary offering unprecedented access to the band as they enter a new era.

title: Pompei: Below the Clouds
overview: Naples faces dual volcanic threats from Vesuvius and Campi Flegrei. Amid increasing tremors, archaeologists work as residents live anxiously, haunted by Pompeii's fate while emergency services strain.

title: Happy Raj
overview: A city romance meets a rural family invasion. What follows is chaos, comedy, and heartfelt moments. The story unfolds as a joyful entertainer that explores love, cultural clashes, and the importance of family bonds.

title: Suyodhana
overview: A young Foley artist has grown up hearing a mysterious voice called Suyodhana and often visualises a figure resembling Duryodhana. Raised by his mother and supported by his childhood friend and partner, his life takes a turn when he is accused of his father’s murder, leading to an investigation that uncovers deeper layers of his past.

title: MUGA NAGA
overview: When a person, driven by self-hatred and inner pain, harms others and betrays friendship in the name of revenge.

title: Kashmir 1947
overview: Kashmir 1947 vividly recounts the tumultuous events of 1947–48, drawing on firsthand testimonies, military perspectives, seldom-seen archives, and a captivating narrative. The documentary weaves together music, songs, and potent narration, presenting history in a way that resonates with modern viewers, even those of a younger generation.  "Kashmir 1947" is a documentary that educates, resonates, and stirs the soul. The film transforms history, crafting a compelling narrative that resonates with contemporary audiences.

title: Grahanam 2.0
overview: Roy and Tina enjoy a picture-perfect life together-until it begins to unravel into an unsettling loop of twists and deception. As the boundaries of their reality shift, the ultimate truth proves to be more chilling than they ever imagined.

title: Madras - The Scene and Politics: A Discussion from Pa Ranjith
Humint
overview: A South Korean agent hunts a drug ring in Russia and goes head-to-head with a North Korean operative — pulling both into peril and tangled secrets.

title: Exmare
overview: A student finds himself stuck reliving the same exam day, using fragments of memory to change his fate.

title: L o r n
overview: Twelve years of waiting. Countless streets walked, countless memories revisited. She thought she knew when to let go, but some pasts refuse to be forgotten. Every corner, every echo, every fleeting glimpse reminds her of him… and of the choice she’s about to make. The letters she wrote, the places she cherished, the moments frozen in time, they all pull her back, even as she tries to move forward. What if letting go isn’t the end? What if the story isn’t over? And what if he comes back when she has finally stopped waiting?
